menu.logoutConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to sign out?

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Update your avatar and username here.
profile.usernameFormat: Username must start with a letter or underscore and contain only letters, numbers, and underscores
profile.usernameChangeMessage: You will need to sign in again after changing your username. Continue?

password.title: Password
password.sameAsOld: New password must differ from current password
password.invalidFormat: Password must be 8–14 characters with uppercase, lowercase, and a digit
password.changeMessage: You will need to sign in again after changing your password. Continue?
password.changeSuccess: Password updated. Please sign in again

email.title: Email
email.description: Update your bound email address here.
email.addressInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
email.changeMessage: You will need to sign in again after changing your email. Continue?
email.changeSuccess: Email updated. Please sign in again

phone.title: Phone
phone.description: Update your bound phone number here.
phone.numberInvalid: Please enter a valid phone number
phone.changeMessage: You will need to sign in again after changing your phone. Continue?
phone.changeSuccess: Phone updated. Please sign in again
